rationale: Keep: the cited paper appears to be a plausible theory/mechanism source for the citing paper’s core claims, since both focus on fit between processing style/strategy and evaluations and both use processing fluency as a mediator (explicitly stated in both paper notes). The citing paper’s stated integration of matching/persuasion and information-processing theories aligns closely with the cited paper’s “knowledge fit” and fluency account, so this is not an obvious incidental mention despite only one DOI-level match record.
